content.en:
Changbai Daozu actually came!!

This was completely unexpected by many of the original ancestors!

Changbai Dao Ancestor left the Changbai High Origin Domain before, and he didn't know where he went, causing the True Mountain Holy Ancestor to snatch the Taixuan Light of the Changbai High Origin Domain.

Now it seems that Changbai Daozu has returned, and after learning that the Hongmeng Purple Light was born in the Shangling Origin Domain, he immediately rushed over, this is to seize the Hongmeng Purple Light of the Shangling Origin Domain!

"I've seen Changbai Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen Changbai Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen Changbai Dao Ancestor!"

One Origin Ancestor said respectfully.

In the face of a sixfold ancestor, they don't dare to make mistakes, they must be respectful.

Changbai Dao Ancestor didn't even glance at these original ancestors, he directly said in a commanding tone: "This Hongmeng purple light, this seat is wanted!"

The Void Tooth Holy Ancestor's face changed, this is Hongmeng Purple Light, and it is also the first Hongmeng Purple Light found in the Shangling Origin Domain now, if you are lucky, you can even create a Sixfold Origin Ancestor, how can it be given to Changbai Dao Ancestor!

"Changbai Dao Ancestor, this is the Hongmeng Purple Light of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, you are doing this a bit too much, right! Moreover, the Ancient Dao Alliance also stipulates that the Sixfold Origin Ancestor is not allowed to act on the Half-Step Sixfold Origin Ancestor and the Origin Ancestor of the following realms at will......

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said.

Although he didn't want to offend Changbai Daozu, for the sake of Hongmeng Ziguang, he could only forcibly scold Changbai Daozu.

"Did you do it?" Changbai Daozu sneered: "This seat didn't kill any of the original ancestors, but just wanted this Hongmeng purple light!

The expressions of many Primordial Ancestors changed, and a Sixfold Primordial Ancestor snatched the Hongmeng Purple Light, how could they snatch it, the difference in strength was like a world of difference!

"If you don't have the strength, get out!"

Changbai Daozu was too lazy to talk nonsense with a group of ants.

If it weren't for the restraint of the Ancient Dao Alliance, he would have wiped out this group of original ancestors with a wave of his hand.

In short, this Hongmeng purple light, he is going to decide!

The previous Taixuan Light had been used by a half-step sixfold ancestor of the Changbai High Origin Domain, but unfortunately the other party failed.

Therefore, the Changbai High Origin Domain is in urgent need of Hongmeng Purple Light, and it may be possible to directly create a Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

With one more Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, the strength of the Changbai High Origin Domain will skyrocket!

On the other hand, if it is given to the Upper Spiritual High Origin Domain, and a Sixfold Origin Ancestor is born here, then it will not be the result that the Changbai High Origin Domain is willing to see!

At this time, Changbai Dao Ancestor directly grabbed Hongmeng Ziguang, and he didn't care about this group of original ancestors at all.

However, at this moment, a figure stopped Changbai Dao Ancestor.

"Changbai Dao Ancestor, this Hongmeng purple light belongs to the Shangling Origin Domain, you can't take it!"

The person who came was Ye Tian.

"The Endless Saint Ancestor is here!"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor was not happy, but was a little worried.

In case it angered the Changbai Dao Ancestor and caused the Changbai Dao Ancestor to be desperate to kill the Endless Saint Ancestor, the Ancient Dao Alliance would at most punish the Changbai Dao Ancestor, but would not kill the Changbai Dao Ancestor.

At this time, the Endless Saint Ancestor shouldn't be up against the Changbai Dao Ancestor!

"You are the Endless Saint Ancestor of the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, and it is rumored that you are a half-step six-fold ancestor invincible? Hehe, this seat has seen many professed half-step sixfold invincible ancestors, but in the end, they couldn't even enter the six-fold ancestor, and they were even killed by other half-step six-fold ancestors. Changbai Daozu sneered.

"Changbai Dao Ancestor, I want this Hongmeng purple light, if you don't leave, then I can only beat you away!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hahaha, you hit this seat and leave? Do you think this seat won't dare to kill you? Although the Ancient Dao Alliance doesn't allow me to kill the half-step Sixfold Ancestor, what if I really kill it?"

Changbai Daozu sneered.

"Let's have a fight, then!"

Ye Tian said.

Changbai Daozu didn't speak, and seemed unwilling to move.

However, at this time, Ye Tian directly grabbed Hongmeng Purple Light.

Seeing this, Changbai Dao Ancestor no longer hesitated.

"Endless Black Domain!"

Ye Tian directly used this natal primordial control technique to trap the Changbai Dao Ancestor.

At this time, Changbai Dao Ancestor looked contemptuous and punched him directly, as if he was going to tear apart Ye Tian's Endless Black Domain with one punch.

However.

Rumble!!!

The Endless Black Domain was only a shock, but it showed no signs of being torn apart.

At this time, Changbai Daozu's face changed.

"How is that possible!"

Although he hasn't made a full attack yet, the casual blow of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor can also kill the top half-step Sixfold Ancestor in seconds!

Moreover, he has been a sixfold ancestor for endless years, and his strength is not weak!

"Endless Primordial!"

Under the amplification of this supreme natal primordial control technique, Ye Tian directly cast endless golden light.

Bang!!!!

The endless golden light directly hit Changbai Dao Ancestor's body, directly cracking his flesh to the ground.

But soon, Changbai Daozu's physical body recovered.

A big war has broken out!

However, compared to Ye Tian, Changbai Dao Ancestor was completely suppressed and injured again and again.

Although his recovery speed was fast, he couldn't hurt Ye Tian, which was embarrassing!

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's endless golden light directly shattered a defensive primordial treasure on Changbai Dao Ancestor's body, and now Changbai Dao Ancestor's defense dropped a lot.

As time passed, Changbai Daozu's injuries could not recover quickly, and his weakness gradually became bigger and bigger!

Finally, at a certain moment, Changbai Dao Ancestor directly tore through the barrier of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, escaped into the Primordial Black Sea, and chose to escape.

Seeing this scene, the half-step six-fold ancestor who was watching around was dumbfounded.

"The Endless Saint Ancestor actually beat the Changbai Dao Ancestor away?"

They couldn't believe it!

That was the sixfold primordial ancestor of the famous primeval realm, and Ye Tian was only a half-step sixfold primordial ancestor!

Half-step Sixfold Ancestor can skip the level and defeat Sixfold Ancestor?

The Sixfold Primordial Ancestor is called the Dao Ancestor, and he is the true ruler of the Primeval Origin Realm!

This kind of existence was actually defeated by Ye Tian!

This is a record breaking the boundary of the primeval plains!

Since the battles were all carried out in Ye Tian's Endless Black Domain, the scope of destruction was not large, but it did not cause great damage to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

"I'll take this Hongmeng purple light, do you have any opinions?"

Ye Tian said.

"Endless Holy Ancestor just take it, I don't have an opinion!"

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor hurriedly said.

The other half-step sixfold ancestors naturally had no opinion, after all, Ye Tian was now comparable to a sixfold ancestor, who would dare to refute Ye Tian's opinion!

In this way, Ye Tian directly captured Hongmeng Purple Light, and then returned to the Void Tooth Holy Gate.
